metadata.purpose: Munition-target effect matrix for Taiwan bombardment campaign-analysis simulation.
metadata.scope_note: Generic category-level pairings only. No strike plan, no sequencing, no aimpoints. Effects are conditional on detection and on a package reaching the target; ISR, air defense, re-attack, and BDA are separate layers.
metadata.state_rule: If destroyed is true, suppression is irrelevant. Suppression is boolean and should reset the next simulation day.

probability_interpretation.probability_destroyed: Probability that one engagement package destroys the target/category instance, conditional on detection and successful delivery to the target area.
probability_interpretation.probability_suppressed_if_not_destroyed: Probability that one engagement package suppresses the target if it is not destroyed. Roll destroyed first.

target_inventory_2026.title: Taiwan Bombardment Target Inventory JSONs and Research Memo
target_inventory_2026.publisher: Deep research agent output supplied by simulation designer
target_inventory_2026.claim_supported: Target categories, target attributes, and target type templates.

calibration_notes: Mobile-target destruction probabilities are deliberately conservative.
Buried targets have near-zero destruction probability except for DF-15C penetrator packages.

Inorganic-Slow systems have very low effect against mobile and moveable targets in hiding because target movement between detection and impact is assumed to matter, even though detection itself is modeled elsewhere.
Organic systems perform better against active mobile targets, but their survivability against Taiwan air defenses is not included here.
metadata.standalone_calculator_suppression_rule: The standalone IJFS calculator should ignore suppression effects for now. Existing suppression probabilities are retained for future integration but should not be applied in this prototype.
metadata.inventory_accounting_rule: Each attack decrements Red munition inventory by rounds_expended_per_engagement. No partial salvos; if inventory_remaining < rounds_expended_per_engagement, skip that munition-target attack.
metadata.detection_rule: Pairing effects are conditional on target detection. Static targets are always known; moveable and mobile targets require a daily detection roll.

mobile_target_destroy_caps.description: Apply these runtime caps to probability_destroyed before resolving mobile-target attacks. Active posture uses full cap; hiding posture uses hidden cap. Caps apply even when target has been detected.
